reasoning: The evidence suggests the June 2024 ceasefire held through October 2025. Israeli military activity in October 2025 focused on Lebanon/Hezbollah (search_1_result_1, search_1_summary), not direct Iran strikes. There are no credible reports of qualifying strikes on Iranian soil, embassies, or consulates between the knowledge cutoff (Oct 26) and the resolution date (Oct 31). The October 23 ISS report appears to be retrospective analysis of earlier strikes, not recent events. With only 5 days remaining and no reported violations, plus constraints on Israeli capacity, the probability of a qualifying strike is low (15%).
